headlines.title: Biological parents of baby in embryo mix-up made ‘heartbreaking’ choice not to fight for custody, attorney says
headlines.description: The parents are trying to navigate an “absolutely impossible situation,” the lawyer said. The custody agreement allows them to remain in the baby’s life, he said.

headlines.title: Gilgo Beach serial killer sentenced to multiple life terms after victims’ families blast him as ‘demon’
headlines.description: Rex Heuermann admitted to killing eight women, putting an end to an investigation that had puzzled authorities and left victims’ families in agony.

headlines.title: Obama encourages people to not give in to despair in current political climate
headlines.description: Former President Barack Obama speaks at the opening of the Obama Presidential Center, imploring Americans not to give in to cynicism and despair in the current divisive political climate.

headlines.title: Michelle Obama speaks at the opening of the Obama Presidential Center in Chicago
headlines.description: Former first lady Michelle Obama spoke at the opening of the Obama Presidential Center in Chicago, praising her husband, former President Barack Obama, for his many contributions and "unflappable" composure during his time in office.

headlines.title: Knicks fans climb up scaffolding to get a better view of parade
headlines.description: Video shows Knicks fans climbing up scaffolding to watch the parade in New York city.

headlines.title: Mamdani dances with Karl-Anthony Towns during Knicks parade in New York City
headlines.description: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani dances with Knicks player Karl-Anthony Towns during the parade celebrating their championship win.

headlines.title: Pride and protest in ‘Tehrangeles’: A divided diaspora watches Iran at the World Cup
headlines.description: Iran national team fans watched the 2-2- draw with New Zealand at the World Cup in Los Angeles, many holding the lion and sun flag in protest at the Islamic Republic.

headlines.title: 23 of the best cleaning products you’ll find on Amazon
headlines.description: These top-rated Amazon cleaning tools and gadgets are ideal for getting your home clean. Choose from supplies for laundry, kitchen, bath and more.

headlines.title: Amazon has air conditioners for every room size and budget
headlines.description: Amazon has highly rated air conditioners for small, medium and large rooms from brands like Frigidaire, LG and Black+Decker.

headlines.title: The best dehumidifiers of 2026, according to experts
headlines.description: Controlling indoor humidity can prevent mold, mildew, allergies and overly dry skin, according to our experts. Shop their top picks from Frigidaire, Midea and more.

headlines.title: The Apple Watch Series 11 is back at its lowest price ever
headlines.description: The latest Apple Watch Series 11 is 25% off right now, matching the lowest price we’ve seen. It has great health tracking features and easily syncs with any iPhone.

headlines.title: Upriver Fire in Washington has burned more than 220 acres
headlines.description: Firefighters are fighting the rapidly growing Upriver Fire in Spokane, Washington, which has burned more than 220 acres and is 10% contained. KHQ’s Belle Lewis reports on evacuation orders and local wind conditions.
